payload.note: Delayed ACK — T11 review arrived simultaneously with our T11 outbound (turn collision). All 3 findings confirmed applied in current codebase.

findings.finding: 'property rights' mapped to ICESCR Article 11 — overstates/mischaracterizes the positive-liberty entitlement as a negative-liberty right
findings.resolution: Applied: changed to 'economic stability and family security' — accurate descriptor of Article 10/11 protections without importing negative-liberty property-rights framing
findings.current_text: Conservatives value economic stability and family security — the ICESCR protects both (Articles 10, 11).

findings.finding: 'Personal letters carry more weight than form letters' — unhedged factual assertion without citation in voter lens
findings.resolution: Applied: 'Research suggests personal letters carry more weight than form letters' — CMF research hedging matches the evidence confidence level
findings.current_text: Research suggests personal letters carry more weight than form letters.

findings.finding: 'mirrors how the ADA moved from concept to law' — 'mirrors' implies structural equivalence between simple majority (ADA) and two-thirds Senate vote (treaty ratification)
findings.resolution: Applied: 'echoes how the ADA moved from concept to law' — similarity without implying mechanical equivalence
findings.current_text: that echoes how the ADA moved from concept to law.
